div.h2: x86_64 Syscall Return Value Space — Errno Detection: The [-4096, -1] Range

g.text: -2 | 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFE | ENOENT | No such file or directory
-28 | 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFE4 | ENOSPC | No space left on device
Where errno detection is called (tracer loop)
Entry stop | orig_rax read | do NOT call is_error_return
Exit stop | rax read | CALL is_error_return(regs.rax)
On error | print -1 ENAME | fprintf: = -1 ENOENT (msg)
Stats accum | error_count++ | only when is_error_return true
Filter gate | after stats | filter does NOT affect stats
0x8000000000000000 | INT64_MIN | NOT an errno — too large
kernel never uses values below -4095 as errno codes
0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFE | -2 = ENOENT | No such file or directory
Problem | lseek() CAN return large positive
Problem | mmap addr might look negative
Consequence | misclassifies valid returns as errors
Both true | → it IS an error
